title: Elior India International Enterprises is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Elior India International Enterprises is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Elior India International Enterprises in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Elior India International Enterprises:
Elior India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Elior India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
